description: Welcome to our barbershop. We offer precision cuts and a great experience for every client. Our experienced barbers are dedicated to making you look and feel your best.

services.name: Classic Haircut
services.description: A timeless cut tailored to your style. Scissor or clipper finish.

services.name: Fade
services.description: Clean skin fade to any length. Low, mid, or high — precision every time.

services.name: Buzz Cut
services.description: Simple, sharp, and effortless. One length all the way around.

services.name: Kids Haircut
services.description: Patient and friendly service for the little ones.

services.name: Beard Trim
services.description: Shape and clean your beard to keep it looking its best.

services.name: Hot Towel Shave
services.description: Classic straight razor shave with hot towel treatment. The full experience.

barbers.name: James
barbers.bio: Specialises in fades, beard work, and classic cuts. Known for precision and attention to detail.

barbers.name: Marcus
barbers.bio: Expert in modern styles and skin fades. Always delivers a clean, sharp finish.
